panels.description: Average rate of heap object allocation, across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Heap Object Allocation Rate

targets.expr:
avg(
    sum(
      rate(
        container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container!~"POD|metadata|", namespace="$network", pod=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])
        *100) by (instance, container,pod)
)by (container)
